sourcesContent:
import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import styles from '../styles/AboutPage.module.css'; // Import your achievement images from assets folder import pic1 from '../assets/pic1.png'; import pic2 from '../assets/pic2.png'; import pic3 from '../assets/pic3.png'; import pic4 from '../assets/pic4.png'; import pic5 from '../assets/pic5.png'; const AboutPage = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); // Your personal tournament achievements const tournamentAchievements = [ { id: 1, title: 'MLBB Campus Championship 2023', rank: '🏆 Champion', image: pic1, description: 'Led my team to victory in the inter-school tournament, securing the championship title.', date: 'December 2023', medal: '🥇 Gold Medal' }, { id: 2, title: 'Local Barangay Esports League', rank: '🏆 2nd Place - Runner Up', image: pic2, description: 'Competed against top players in the city and secured runner-up position.', date: 'September 2023', medal: '🥈 Silver Medal' }, { id: 3, title: 'Online Warriors Tournament', rank: '⚔️ MVP Award', image: pic3, description: 'Awarded Most Valuable Player for outstanding performance throughout the tournament.', date: 'June 2023', medal: '⭐ MVP Title' }, { id: 4, title: 'MobaFolio Community Cup', rank: '👑 Organizer & Champion', image: pic4, description: 'Created and won the first community tournament, bringing players together.', date: 'March 2024', medal: '🏆 Champion' }, { id: 5, title: 'Ranked Season 30 Achievement', rank: '🌟 Mythical Glory 1000+ Points', image: pic5, description: 'Achieved Mythical Glory with 1000+ points, ranking in top 500 of the region.', date: 'January 2024', medal: '🔥 Top 500' } ]; // Your personal gaming stats const gamingStats = [ { value: '2,500+', label: 'Total Matches', icon: '⚔️' }, { value: '1,800+', label: 'Wins', icon: '🏆' }, { value: '68%', label: 'Win Rate', icon: '📊' }, { value: 'Mythical Glory', label: 'Highest Rank', icon: '👑' }, { value: '25+', label: 'Tournaments Joined', icon: '🎮' }, { value: '12', label: 'Tournament Wins', icon: '🥇' }, { value: '5', label: 'Savage Medals', icon: '⚡' }, { value: '15+', label: 'Maniac Achievements', icon: '💀' } ]; // Your mastered heroes const masteredHeroes = [ { name: 'Lancelot', role: 'Assassin', matches: '800+', winrate: '72%', image: pic4 }, { name: 'Gusion', role: 'Assassin', matches: '600+', winrate: '68%', image: pic5 }, { name: 'Ling', role: 'Assassin', matches: '500+', winrate: '70%', image: pic3 }, { name: 'Fanny', role: 'Assassin', matches: '400+', winrate: '65%', image: pic2 } ]; // Your personal gaming journey const journeyMilestones = [ { year: '2021', achievement: 'Started playing Mobile Legends', icon: '🎮' }, { year: '2022', achievement: 'Reached Mythic rank for the first time', icon: '⭐' }, { year: '2023', achievement: 'Joined first local tournament', icon: '🏆' }, { year: '2023', achievement: 'Won Campus Championship', icon: '🥇' }, { year: '2024', achievement: 'Created MobaFolio to inspire others', icon: '💡' }, { year: '2024', achievement: 'Reached Mythical Glory 1000+ points', icon: '👑' } ]; return (
{/* Hero Section - Your Story */}
🎮 Mobile Legends Player & Content Creator

My Mobile Legends Journey

From a casual player to tournament champion — sharing my achievements, experiences, and passion to inspire every MLBB player to reach their dreams.

{user && (
🎉 Welcome back, {user.name}! Thanks for being part of this journey 🎉
)}
{/* Personal Quote / Mission */}

"Every player starts somewhere. I started as a Warrior, and through dedication, practice, and learning from losses, I reached Mythical Glory. Now, I want to help YOU achieve your gaming dreams too!"

- MobaFolio Creator

{/* Gaming Stats Section */}

📊 My Gaming Profile

{gamingStats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.icon}
{stat.value}
{stat.label}
))}
{/* Tournament Achievements Section */}

🏆 Tournament Achievements

{tournamentAchievements.map((tournament) => (
{tournament.rank}

{tournament.title}

📅 {tournament.date} {tournament.medal}

{tournament.description}

))}
{/* Mastered Heroes Section */}

⚔️ My Mastered Heroes ⚔️

{masteredHeroes.map((hero, index) => (

{hero.name}

{hero.role}

📊 {hero.matches} matches 🎯 {hero.winrate} win rate
))}
{/* Gaming Journey Timeline */}

📅 My MLBB Journey

{journeyMilestones.map((milestone, index) => (
{milestone.icon}
{milestone.year}

{milestone.achievement}

))}
{/* Tips & Advice Section */}

💡 Tips From My Experience

🎯

Master 2-3 Heroes

Focus on mastering a small hero pool rather than playing every hero. This helped me reach Mythical Glory.

🤝

Teamwork Matters

Communication and synergy with teammates won me more tournaments than individual skill alone.

📹

Review Your Gameplay

Recording and analyzing my matches helped me identify mistakes and improve faster.

💪

Never Give Up

Losses are lessons. Every defeat taught me something that made me a better player.

{/* Call to Action - Inspire Others */}

Ready to Start Your Journey?

If I can do it, so can you! Join MobaFolio today, share your achievements, and let's build a community where every player inspires others to reach greater heights!

{!user ? (
Join the Community 🎮 Explore Achievements 👀
) : ( Share Your Achievement ✍️ )}
); }; export default AboutPage;
